✓ Detected Claude Code at /FAKE/.claude
✓ Symlinks at /FAKE/.local/bin/: 13/13 (N newly created)
✓ Wrote 3 hook entries to /FAKE/.claude/settings.json
⚠ Legacy bespoke hooks detected (predate `cctally setup`; failing silently on this system). Skipped at your request. Re-run `cctally setup --migrate-legacy-hooks` later, or remove them yourself. The four `.py` files are at ~/.claude/hooks/{record-usage-stop,usage-poller{,-start,-stop}}.py.
⚠ No Claude OAuth token detected.
  Run `claude` once to authenticate. After that, the next assistant
  message in any Claude Code session will start collecting data
  automatically — no need to re-run `cctally setup`.
✓ Synced session cache (N new entries)

cctally is ready (with 2 warning(s) above).

⚠ Restart Claude Code for the new hooks to take effect in any currently
  open sessions. New sessions launched after this point pick them up
  automatically. (settings.json is cached at session start.)

  Try:
    cctally daily              # last 30 days
    cctally dashboard          # live web dashboard
    cctally tui                # terminal dashboard
    cctally setup --status     # verify install state
